Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -c "
from cmas.core.config import Config
c = Config\(\)
print\(f'Config OK: port={c.port}, model={c.model}'\)

from cmas.core.session import SessionManager
sm = SessionManager\(c.sqlite_path\)
print\(f'Session OK'\)

from cmas.core.memory import Memory
m = Memory\(\)
print\(f'Memory OK: {m.get_stats\(\)[\\"total_entries\\"]} entries'\)

from cmas.cli import main, get_project_dir
print\(f'CLI OK: project_dir = {get_project_dir\(\\"test\\"\)}'\)

print\('All imports working!'\)
")

from cmas.core.config import Config
